title: View Through a Window May Influence Recovery from Surgery
notes: N=46 matched pairs. Tree view vs brick wall. 8.5% shorter hospital stay, less analgesia.

title: Nature views and hospital recovery outcomes: meta-analysis
notes: 28 studies meta-analysis. Nature views → shorter stays, less analgesia. Replicates and expands Ulrich 1984.

title: Slowing of Wound Healing by Psychological Stress
notes: N=13 dental students. Wounds heal 40% slower under psychological stress. Matched pairs.

title: Relationship of Childhood Abuse and Household Dysfunction to Many of the Leading Causes of Death in Adults (ACE Study)
notes: N=9,508 (CDC). Adverse Childhood Experiences dose-response predicts all major causes of death. Foundational trauma-health link.

title: Therapeutic Influences of Plants in Hospital Rooms on Surgical Recovery
notes: N=90 RCT. Plants in hospital room → reduced blood pressure, heart rate, pain, anxiety.

title: Effect of Forest Bathing Trips on Human Immune Function
notes: 24 Japanese forests field experiments. Cortisol -13-16%. NK cell activity increase.

title: Psychological Prehabilitation Improves Surgical Recovery
notes: Meta-analysis of 20 RCTs, N=2,376. Psychological prehabilitation = 1.62 days shorter hospital stay.

title: WELL certification and occupant health outcomes
notes: 3,268 surveys. WELL-certified buildings → 39% higher satisfaction vs LEED. Largest matched survey to date.

title: Biophilic Design and Health Outcomes: Systematic Review
notes: Systematic review. Biophilic design → reduced hospitalization time, pain, mortality.

title: Salutogenic architecture and sense of coherence in elderly: systematic review
notes: PRISMA, 26 papers. Salutogenic architecture → sense of coherence in elderly populations.

title: Circadian lighting interventions and fall prevention
notes: Circadian-appropriate lighting → 50% fewer falls. Better sleep quality.

title: Hospital noise and patient outcomes
notes: Hospital noise levels exceed WHO 45 dBA recommendations by >20 dBA. Sleep disruption, stress, impaired recovery.

title: CBT combined with physical therapy vs physical therapy alone
notes: Multiple meta-analyses. CBT + physical therapy consistently outperforms physical therapy alone.

title: Horticultural therapy meta-analysis: QoL in elderly
notes: Meta-analysis. Horticultural therapy → improved QoL, anxiety, depression in elderly.

title: Pulsed Electromagnetic Fields — Effect on Neural Tissue Regeneration
notes: In vitro (nerve cell cultures). 10 Hz square wave PEMF → 2.5-4x neural tissue regeneration. Preclinical only — cannot extrapolate to human clinical outcomes directly.

title: Associations of Cognitive Function Scores with Carbon Dioxide, Ventilation, and Volatile Organic Compound Exposures in Office Workers
notes: N=24. Enhanced ventilation (40 cfm/person) + low-VOC → 101% higher cognitive function vs conventional. Crisis Response +131%, Strategy +288%. CO2 and VOCs independently associated.

title: Weighted blankets as an effective treatment for insomnia: A randomized placebo-controlled trial
notes: N=120. Cohen's d=1.90 (large effect). 12-month follow-up. Weighted blankets → improved insomnia.

title: Prolonged Expiration Activates Parasympathetic Nervous System
notes: Extended exhale (exhale > inhale) activates parasympathetic via vagal pathways. Cortisol reduction from diaphragmatic breathing confirmed.
